title: Not Enough Trinket Slots (NETS)
description: A Trinkets add-on that enables more slots than you'll ever need!
body:
Not Enough Trinket Slots (NETS) adds "a few" extra slots to the Trinkets mod, which for example means that you can wear more than just two rings at the same time!
 
Please consider helping out with bugs or ideas as this is my first mod! Well, technically it's a datapack packed into a mod similar to Terralith by Starmute.


Features:

- Higher number of slots for almost every default type
 

Planned features:

- Configuration file or screen to easily configure the amount of slots for each type and to enable/disable them completely (cancelled)
- Custom universal slot that can hold any Trinket
- (Only an idea) Enchantment, that enables more slots the higher the lvl is (similar to Deep Pockets Enchantment from Inventorio, but for Trinkets only) (cancelled)
 

This Mod requires Fabric 0.14.21 and Trinkets 3.7.1+ for the latest release
No guarantee that this works on Quilt, but make sure to use a similar release as for Fabric.

Also works with [Trinkets Canary](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets-canary) by [Ryhon](https://modrinth.com/user/Ryhon) on 1.21.4 - 1.21.10 :D

Please note: I'm not a professional programmer (can't even call myself a beginner yet) which means that development is most likely very slow. I can't promise anything, but I'll try my best.
